LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY JULIO CUELLAR. ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. MR. ROMERO REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS, THE COURT CONTINUED PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY JULIO CUELLAR TO MAY 28, 2021 AT 9;30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. ANY FILING FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION BY RESPONDENT CUELLAR IS TO BE ON FILE BY MAY 18, 2021. THE PEOPLE'S RESPONSE, IF ANY, SHALL BE ON FILE BY MAY 21, 2021. THE COURT WILL NOT ACCEPT ANY LATE FILINGS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL:RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-28-2021 HEARING RE: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY JULIO CUELLAR, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE PEOPLE'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY JULIO CUELLAR IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Julio Cuellar
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. COLIN ALEXANDER, Esq. of San Francisco District Attorney's Office (Tel: 628-652-4248) for the People;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Julio Cuellar

Matter no contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The People's unopposed motion for final judgment as to interested party Julio Cuellar is granted.

Counsel for the People is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Julio Cuellar
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Continued To May-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearamces (via ZOOM videconference):
Atty. Colin Alexander, Esq. for the Petitioner, The People of the State of California;
Atty. Lew Romero, Esq. for the Respondent, Julio Cuellar.

Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Julio Cuellar.

The matter is called. ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS are held. Mr. Romero requests a continuance.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court continues Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Julio Cuellar to May 28, 2021 at 9;30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Any filing for the Court's consideration by Respondent Cuellar is to be on file by May 18, 2021. The People's response, if any, shall be on file by May 21, 2021. The Court will not accept any late filings.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email:RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
